title: Add CLI storage conf example to run manpage
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Add an example to the run man page to illustrate how
you can configure storage from the CLI.  This addresses
a request from issue #2662.

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body:

@TomSweeneyRedHat LGFM, but maybe just use `overlay.mount_program=/opt/fuse-overlayfs` to keep the lines short? :-)
@tobwen, I went with @mheon's shortened version instead.
